summary: There is a potential biologic linkage between elevated homocysteine and vitiligo through shared underlying mechanisms involving autoimmunity and deficiencies in vitamins B12 and folic acid. This association arises because both conditions can be part of broader autoimmune syndromes such as pernicious anemia or Hashimoto’s thyroiditis.
